subject: ack
body: Acknowledged assignment to continue #50 (animation backlog). I'll download remaining PixelLab frames and bake them into strips. Current frame gaps: Jack death (9f), landing-roll (7f), rifle-attack (7f); Stalker death (9f), landing-roll (7f), super-leap (7f), sonic-shriek (9f), lash-tongue (9f). Starting now.
